parameters.content:
## Paperless-ngx → SuiteDash Document Router

Trigger: Paperless-ngx webhook fires when a new document is consumed/tagged.
Flow: Get document metadata → match to client by entity name/number → upload to SuiteDash → notify client.

**SETUP:**
1. In Paperless-ngx admin → Settings → Webhooks → Add:
   URL: https://n8n.audreysplace.place/webhook/crop-paperless-doc
   Trigger: Document Added
2. Set PAPERLESS_URL and PAPERLESS_API_TOKEN in n8n credentials
3. Set SuiteDash credentials

parameters.subject: ⚠️ Unmatched document received — manual review needed
